skinPacks.name: Five Nights at Frickbear's 3
skinPacks.description: To celebrate Frickbear's 3 release, we've published our nightguard skins we made for our Frickbears collab trailer!

skins.name: Jeremy Fitzgerald
skins.desc: 'Gosh Jeremy, what's a fella like you doing working at a place like this?'

skins.name: Mike Schmidt
skins.desc: 'Working at the last place in town that would even think about hiring a blasphemously incompetent neanderthal.'

skins.name: Vanessa Shelly
skins.desc: 'Guess things have a funny way of working themselves out.'
